title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Manipal Digital Health
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Manipal Digital Health! We are hiring a Frontend Developer for our Vijayawada team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Manipal Digital Health:
Manipal Digital Health is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Digital Health!
